_meta.description: Saved disc loadouts, selectable at the CLI's disc step instead of manual entry. User data, not game data — edit freely.
_meta.conventions: Substats are stored as TOTAL rolls (in-game '+N' + 1, counting the initial roll). Every disc is validated against discs.json on load: 4 distinct substats, no duplicate of the main stat, <= 6 rolls each, <= 9 total, unique slots per loadout. Optional 'set' names a key in disc_sets.json. Optional 'agent' (an agents.json key) reserves the loadout's inventory discs for that character: other agents cannot equip them and the optimizer skips them; loadouts without 'agent' reserve nothing.
